meaning: n.短上衣,夹克,(锅炉、水管等的)套,书籍的封面套纸,护封,马铃薯皮vt.给...穿夹克,给...装护套
examples: I zipped and buttoned my jacket.
Interesting that he has a flak jacket, he's taking precautions on both sides of the fence.
Stick to tailored dresses and skirts paired with a sweater or a jacket to maintain a professional look.
